Soil/Rock Description: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and occasionally some red bricks. (FILL)
Sub-rounded Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow and occasionally narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese kaolin and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10°-20°, 40°-50°.
